name: Auto-classify documents with Gemini and organize in Google Drive

parameters.content:
### How it works
This workflow picks up files from a Google Drive inbox folder and classifies each one using Gemini 2.5 Flash OCR. Based on the result, it renames the file, moves it to the matching folder, and logs everything to Google Sheets.

If a deadline is detected (payment due, contract renewal, etc.), it creates a Google Calendar event and sends a Gmail alert. Failed classifications are emailed for manual review and logged to a separate error sheet.

### Setup steps
1. Set your inbox folder ID in **Get inbox files**
2. Add your Gemini API key as a Query Auth credential (parameter name: `key`)
3. Set destination folder IDs for each document type in **Generate filename**
4. Set your spreadsheet ID in **Log to spreadsheet** and **Log error to sheet**
5. Set your calendar ID in **Add to calendar**
6. Set your notification email in **Send deadline alert** and **Send error notification**

### Customization
- Edit the classification prompt in **Gemini OCR classification** to add document types
- Adjust the confidence threshold (default 0.6) in **Parse AI response**
- Modify the filename pattern in **Generate filename**

## 1. Retrieve files
Pulls all files from a designated Google Drive inbox folder and processes them one at a time through a loop.

## 2. Classify documents
Checks file type (PDF or image), converts to Base64, and sends to Gemini 2.5 Flash for OCR classification. Unsupported formats go to error handling.

## 3. Rename & organize
Builds a standardized filename, renames the file, and moves it to the matching folder in Google Drive.

## 4. Log & schedule deadlines
Appends results to Google Sheets. If a deadline is found, creates a calendar event and sends an email alert via Gmail.

## Error handling
Sends a Gmail notification for failed classifications and logs the error to a separate sheet for manual review.

nodes.name: Download file
nodes.notes: Downloads the file binary from Google Drive for processing

nodes.name: Check file type
nodes.notes: Routes PDF and image files to classification; other formats go to error handling

nodes.name: Convert to Base64
nodes.notes: Encodes file binary to Base64 for the Gemini API request

nodes.name: Gemini OCR classification
nodes.notes: Sends the Base64-encoded file to Gemini 2.5 Flash for OCR and document classification

nodes.name: Parse AI response
nodes.notes: Parses the Gemini JSON response and validates confidence >= 0.6

nodes.name: Classification check
nodes.notes: TRUE = valid classification → organize files. FALSE = failed → error handling

nodes.name: Rename file
nodes.notes: Renames the file in Google Drive with the standardized name

nodes.name: Move to folder
nodes.notes: Moves the file to the document-type folder in Google Drive

nodes.name: Generate filename
nodes.notes: Builds filename (e.g. INV_20250101_CompanyName.pdf) and maps document type to folder ID

nodes.name: Log to spreadsheet
nodes.notes: Appends the classification result to the main log sheet

nodes.name: Has deadline?
nodes.notes: Checks if the document has a deadline date to schedule

nodes.name: Add to calendar
nodes.notes: Creates an all-day calendar event on the deadline date

nodes.name: Send deadline alert
nodes.notes: Sends an email notification about the upcoming deadline

nodes.name: Send error notification
nodes.notes: Emails an alert when classification fails or confidence is too low

parameters.message:
=

Automatic document classification failed

The following file could not be classified automatically by AI. Please review it manually.

FieldDetails
Filename{{ $json.originalFileName }}
Error{{ $json.errorMessage || 'Low confidence / unable to classify' }}
Confidence{{ $json.confidence || 'N/A' }}
Processed at{{ $json.processedAt }}
FileOpen in Drive

This email was sent automatically by AI Document Organizer
parameters.subject: =[Action Required] AI classification failed - {{ $json.originalFileName }}

nodes.name: Log error to sheet
nodes.notes: Logs failed classifications to a separate error sheet for manual review

nodes.name: Handle unsupported format
nodes.notes: Creates an error object for file types that are not PDF or image

nodes.name: Done - no deadline
nodes.notes: End of flow for documents with no deadline

nodes.name: When clicking 'Execute workflow'
nodes.notes: Run this workflow manually or replace with a Schedule Trigger for automation

nodes.name: Get inbox files
nodes.notes: Fetches all files from the inbox folder — set YOUR_INBOX_FOLDER_ID to your folder

nodes.name: Loop through files
nodes.notes: Processes files one at a time to avoid API rate limits
